raw_transcript: It will help, but you also need to start Sitz baths—soaking in warm water for ten minutes twice a day. Most importantly, we must stop the straining. I want you on a daily stool softener and a high-fiber supplement.
final_corrected_note: It will help, but you also need to start Sitz baths—soaking in warm water for ten minutes twice a day. Most importantly, we must stop the straining. I want you on a daily stool softener and a high-fiber supplement.
